A selective four-year program for students intent on combining majors across two or more WashU schools. Students take a multi-year sequence of interdisciplinary seminars and design their own cross-school path — for example, marketing + psychology, urban studies + dance, or political science + biology — across Arts & Sciences, McKelvey Engineering, Olin Business, and Sam Fox.
